description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Embedded build that runs on every push to master and tags matching v*, and on pull requests. Use concurrency to cancel in-progress jobs. The workflow has a job for RaspberryPi64 that runs on ubuntu-latest with an archlinux container, checks out the repository, installs dependencies, builds and deploys, and uploads a tarball artifact. It also creates a GitHub release with the uploaded artifact when a tag is pushed or a continuous build is made.
